name: ShopRite Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of ₹1.5 Lakhs in the previous membership year
additionalBenefits: 10% discount on movie tickets on BookMyShow up to ₹100 per transaction, up to 15 times a calendar year
Welcome benefit of 2,000 Reward Points upon card activation and payment of joining fee
additionalDetails: Redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies per redemption request via the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in).
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% at all fuel stations for transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (Max waiver ₹100/month).

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via RBL Rewards portal

salaried: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable income source meeting bank criteria
selfEmployed: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable business income meeting bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
Grocery reward rate of 20 Reward Points per ₹100 spent is capped at 1,000 reward points per calendar month.
Welcome benefit of 2,000 Reward Points is credited within 30 days of joining fee payment.
Annual fee waiver applies on spends of ₹1.5 Lakhs in the previous membership year.
Redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies per request via the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in). Statement credit redemption at ₹0.25 per point is supported.
